title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC SENTENCE IMPROVEMENT301 400 BY

questions.question: Q301. He travelled the whole world, but found piece at home. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Piece' (टुकड़ा) के स्थान पर 'peace' (शांति) शब्द context के अनुसार सही है.

questions.question: Q302. Farmers have harvested wheat by using whatever labour that was available to them. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Limited' labour (सीमित श्रम) सही है क्योंकि 'whatever was available' संसाधनों की कमी को दर्शाता है.

questions.question: Q303. You can become confident to speak English within one year. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Confident' के साथ 'in' preposition और gerund (speaking) का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q304. The unexpected turn beside the project put the company in a big financial crisis. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'In' का प्रयोग project में भागीदारी या बदलाव को दर्शाने के लिए सही है.

questions.question: Q305. Politics and money go together in this country. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: "Go hand in hand" एक idiom है जिसका अर्थ है साथ-साथ चलना (closely connected).

questions.question: Q306. The decision to engage in an armed conflict is tacit. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Tacit' का अर्थ है बिना कहे समझा जाना (implied without being stated).

questions.question: Q307. The cat climbed a tree and perched itself on a branch. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है. 'Perched' का अर्थ है ऊँची जगह पर बैठना.

questions.question: Q308. Fifty rupees feels too much for such a pen. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Seems' (प्रतीत होना) मूल्य के संदर्भ में 'feels' से अधिक उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: Q309. Despite of an injury, he won the match. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Despite' के साथ 'of' का प्रयोग नहीं होता है.

questions.question: Q310. Lily has dedicate her life towards becoming a doctor. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Tense में 'has' के बाद verb की 3rd form ('dedicated') का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q311. Health insurance are important today since anyone can face a medical emergency without warning. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'Health insurance' के लिए singular verb 'is' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q312. It was a quite afternoon, so Dan decided to take a nap. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Quite' (काफी) के स्थान पर 'Quiet' (शांत) adjective का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q313. People say different things at different times. (SSC CPO 05/10/2023 3rd Shift)
options: say diverse things at different times
says whimsical things at different times
should say fanciful things at different times
says delectable things at different times
questions.explanation: 'Diverse' (विविध) शब्द 'different' के संदर्भ में सही है.

questions.question: Q314. Andrew will playing basketball at the college tournament. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'Andrew' के साथ 'is' और verb की ing form (playing) आएगी.

questions.question: Q315. Selling, purchasing, and using an illegally copied product is a criminal offence. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Illegally copied' उत्पाद को 'pirated' कहा जाता है.

questions.question: Q316. With all their little comforts destroyed, the survivors were thrown still farther back into barbarism. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 2nd Shift)
options: still a little farther into barbarism
questions.explanation: Figurative distance (लाक्षणिक दूरी) के लिए 'further' का प्रयोग होता है, न कि 'farther' का.

questions.question: Q317. He said that I have finished my work. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Indirect speech में pronouns और tense बदलते हैं (I -> he, have -> had).

questions.question: Q318. Many great people born in that small village. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Passive structure में plural subject 'people' के साथ 'were born' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q319. It is true that learning English is essential for professionals to survived the national and international competitions. (SSC MTS 01/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: उद्देश्य बताने के लिए preposition 'for' + gerund (surviving) का प्रयोग सही है.

questions.question: Q320. Peer pressure is bound to effect most of us both positively and negatively. (SSC MTS 04/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Effect' (noun) के स्थान पर 'Affect' (verb) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q321. The pandemic has challenged education systems to ensure learning continuity, substantially increasing the demands placed on teachers. (SSC MTS 04/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है.

questions.question: Q322. Mohan unknowingly altered salt instead of sugar to the dessert making it taste terrible. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: भोजन में कुछ मिलाने के लिए 'added' का प्रयोग होता है, 'altered' (बदलना) का नहीं.

questions.question: Q323. No sooner did he finished his examination than he left for his cricket training centre. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 2nd Shift)
options: no sooner than he did finished
questions.explanation: 'Did' के साथ verb की first form ('finish') का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q324. The Delhi administration is seriously worried about the warning to civic health posed by the polluted waters of Yamuna. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Threat' (खतरा) context के अनुसार 'warning' से अधिक उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: Q325. The food was too salty eat this morning. (SSC MTS 05/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Too...to' structure (too salty to eat) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q326. You are always try with jump over the wall. (SSC MTS 06/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Continuous tense में 'trying' और infinitive 'to jump' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q327. They are sell their company's products to people. (SSC MTS 06/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Present Continuous Tense में 'are' के बाद 'selling' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q328. Virtual reality is the creation of a virtual environment presented to our senses in such a way that we experience it as if we were really there. (SSC MTS 06/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है.

questions.question: Q329. Larger emissions of greenhouse gases lead to higher concentrations in the atmosphere. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है (Plural subject 'emissions' takes plural verb 'lead').

questions.question: Q330. No sooner had the sun risen over the horizon when the birds began to chirp and the squirrels started to scamper around the park. (SSC MTS 08/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'No sooner' के साथ 'than' का प्रयोग होता है (fixed pair).

questions.question: Q331. I considered Geography as an easier subject. (SSC MTS 11/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: कोई तुलना नहीं हो रही है, इसलिए positive degree 'easy' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q332. Rashmi works at the hospital, don't she? (SSC MTS 11/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'Rashmi' के लिए question tag 'doesn't she' होगा.

questions.question: Q333. I (am here) since 1981. (SSC MTS 11/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Since' के साथ time दिया गया है, इसलिए Present Perfect Tense (have been) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q334. Teenage is that phase of life when you are proposed to the world outside. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Exposed to' का अर्थ है बाहरी दुनिया से परिचित होना, जो सही context है.

questions.question: Q335. Very early in the morning, at the beginning of January, Opu was lying in bed waiting for the sun having rose. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 2nd Shift)
options: waited for the sun having rose
waiting for the sun to rise
questions.explanation: Infinitive form 'to rise' का प्रयोग उद्देश्य बताने के लिए सही है.

questions.question: Q336. Newton, after seeing the apple falling from a tree, began to wonder whether if it moved towards the earth and not upwards towards the sky. (SSC MTS 12/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: कारण जानने के लिए 'wonder why' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q337. This film is a non-stop riot that many cite as one of the funny films of all time. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: "One of the" के बाद Superlative degree (funniest) का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q338. If I hand her a flower and say, "Give it to mamma," she take it to her mother. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'she' के लिए simple present tense में 'takes' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q339. The new chairman of the company announced attracted bonus for the employees on the occasion of the new year. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 2nd Shift)
options: announced an attractive bonus for the employees
announcing attracted bonus for the employees
announced attracting bonus for the employees
questions.explanation: Noun 'bonus' को modify करने के लिए Adjective 'attractive' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q340. Rishi asked Karan will he get a new football for him? (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 2nd Shift)
options: would he get a new football for him?
if he would get a new football for him.
if would he get a new football for him?
if he will get a new football for him?
questions.explanation: Indirect speech में interrogative sentence को assertrive में बदलते हैं और 'if' का प्रयोग करते हैं.

questions.question: Q341. If you need any help tomorrow, let him knows. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Let' के बाद objective pronoun और verb की first form (know) आती है.

questions.question: Q342. Helena loves to dig and played in the dirt like any other child. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Parallelism के अनुसार 'to dig' (V1) के साथ 'play' (V1) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q343. The development of skills can contribute to structural transformation and economic growth in enhance employability and labour productivity and helping countries to become more competitive. (SSC MTS 13/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: माध्यम बताने के लिए 'by' + gerund (enhancing) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q344. I used a variety of sources to find the more cheap flight. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Superlative degree 'cheapest' का प्रयोग होगा (सबसे सस्ती उड़ान).

questions.question: Q345. His claim to be the smartly kid in the school was a bit hyperbole! (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Article 'the' के साथ superlative adjective 'smartest' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q346. The rise in temperature is playing havoc with India's rainfall which is pertinent for India's agriculture sector. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Pertinent' (प्रासंगिक) के स्थान पर 'significant' (महत्वपूर्ण) कृषि क्षेत्र के लिए अधिक उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: Q347. Rahul's sister says that my brother is the best dancer in the city. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 3rd Shift)
options: her brother is the best dancer in the city
my brother was the best dancer in the city
her brother was the best dancer in the city
his brother was the best dancer in the city
questions.explanation: Indirect speech में Rahul's sister (female) के अनुसार 'my' बदलकर 'her' हो जाएगा.

questions.question: Q348. A wonder in the plant kingdom, the Great Banyan Tree of the AJC Bose Botanical Garden at Shibpur in Howrah, occupies a unique position in the world records. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 3rd Shift)
options: being occupied a unique position of
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है. 'Unique' से पहले 'a' का प्रयोग सही है.

questions.question: Q349. It has raining very hard and he has a very large umbrella to keep off the rain-drops. (SSC MTS 14/09/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Has raining' गलत है. Present continuous 'is raining' सही होगा.

questions.question: Q350. Adyasha would have been looked gorgeous in ethnic apparel. (SSC CHSL 02/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Active voice में 'would have + V3' (would have looked) का प्रयोग होगा, 'been' अनावश्यक है.

questions.question: Q351. In today's world, technology must be used for feed the changing forces in society. (SSC CHSL 02/08/2023 2nd Shift)
options: must had been used to feed
must have been used to feed
questions.explanation: 'For feed' के स्थान पर infinitive 'to feed' का प्रयोग उद्देश्य बताने के लिए सही है.

questions.question: Q352. She can draw very well and just as creative. (SSC CHSL 02/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Adverb 'well' के साथ parallel structure के लिए adverb 'creatively' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q353. I have been in Chennai since a week, but I am planning to return now. (SSC CHSL 02/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: समय की अवधि (a week) के लिए 'for' का प्रयोग होता है, 'since' का नहीं.

questions.question: Q354. Peter was brought in the penalty area. (SSC CHSL 03/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Bring down' का अर्थ है गिराना (foul करना), जो penalty area के संदर्भ में सही है.

questions.question: Q355. Mahesh's attitude annoyed me and I blew into. (SSC CHSL 03/08/2023 1st Shift)
options: annoyed me and I blew over
annoyed me and I blew off
annoyed me and I blew down of
annoyed me and I blew up
questions.explanation: 'Blew up' का अर्थ है बहुत गुस्सा होना (explode in anger).

questions.question: Q356. I don't think he can dance as wellest Elena. (SSC CHSL 03/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: तुलना के लिए 'as...as' structure का प्रयोग होगा (as well as).

questions.question: Q357. Since the storm knocked in the power, we've been using candles to light our home. (SSC CHSL 03/08/2023 3rd Shift)
options: the storm knocked out the power
the storm knocked over the power
the storm knocked away the power
questions.explanation: 'Knock out' का अर्थ है बिजली गुल करना/बंद करना.

questions.question: Q358. If we had moved to Italy when I was a child, I will had an Italian accent. (SSC CHSL 04/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Third Conditional (Past Perfect) में result clause 'would have + V3' (would have had) होता है.

questions.question: Q359. Lewis can handle many of the European languages with its dialectical varieties fluently (SSC CHSL 04/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Plural noun 'languages' के लिए plural pronoun 'their' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q360. Despite having a broken leg, Sarah managed to finish the marathon on record time. (SSC CHSL 04/08/2023 2nd Shift)
options: finish the marathon in record time
finish a marathon on record time
finish the marathon to record time
finish the marathon at record time
questions.explanation: 'In record time' (रिकॉर्ड समय में) सही मुहावरा है.

questions.question: Q361. It is nothing but pride. (SSC CHSL 04/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Nothing else' का प्रयोग 'but' के साथ exclusion (सिवाय) दर्शाने के लिए किया जा सकता है, हालांकि 'nothing but' भी सही है, पर विकल्प में 'nothing else' बेहतर विकल्प के रूप में दिया गया है (संदर्भ पर निर्भर).

questions.question: Q362. Sujata has not and can never in the good books of her principal as she lacks honesty. (SSC CHSL 07/08/2023 1st Shift)
options: has not been and can never be
has not been and can never been
has not be and can never be
has not be and can never been
questions.explanation: 'Has not' के साथ V3 ('been') और 'can never' के साथ V1 ('be') का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q363. I have been living in this country since last several years but have never experienced any discrimination. (SSC CHSL 07/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: अवधि (several years) के लिए 'for' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q364. He got appreciation from every people in a country and abroad. (SSC CHSL 07/08/2023 3rd Shift)
options: from one and all in the country and abroad
from one or all in a country and abroad
from one and all from a country and abroad
from one and all in country and abroad
questions.explanation: 'One and all' (हर कोई) एक सही phrase है, और देश के लिए 'the country' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q365. The mermaid murmured that it had been very difficult for her to live far from human civilisation. (SSC CHSL 07/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है.

questions.question: Q366. Although he was exhausted from working all day, John continues to study for his upcoming exam. (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 1st Shift)
options: will continue to study for his upcoming exam
has been studying for his upcoming exam
continued to study for his upcoming exam
continues studying for his upcoming exam
questions.explanation: पहला clause past tense (was exhausted) में है, इसलिए दूसरा भी past (continued) में होगा.

questions.question: Q367. One cannot exactly predict the way she behaves in gatherings (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Prefigure' (पहले से कल्पना करना/दिखाना) यहाँ predict के स्थान पर उपयुक्त है.

questions.question: Q368. The most important fruit in Kinnaur is apricot. It is possible to get it at everyplace in huge amount. (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 1st Shift)
options: found for a huge amount everywhere everywhere
found everywhere in a huge amount
found everywhere with a huge amount
find everywhere in a huge amount
questions.explanation: 'Found everywhere' (हर जगह पाया जाता है) सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q369. Can you please make sure that all the guest are gathered on the stage before the performance begins? (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Plural 'guests' और passive voice में 'by' (द्वारा) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q370. She makes sure that all the newly realised books are available in her personal library. (SSC CHSL 08/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: किताबें 'released' (प्रकाशित/जारी) होती हैं, 'realised' नहीं.

questions.question: Q371. The fall of Ranjith for the petty material benefit was really ignominious. (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Reprehensible' (निंदनीय) 'ignominious' (शर्मनाक) का सही पर्यायवाची है.

questions.question: Q372. The people who live here have had the same kind of lifestyle until hundreds of years. (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: समय की अवधि (hundreds of years) के लिए 'for' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q373. All colleagues of Rohit except Joseph have commemorated the elective courses they are planning to offer. (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Courses को 'considered' (विचार करना) किया जाता है, 'commemorated' (यादगार बनाना) नहीं.

questions.question: Q374. As the orchestra began to play, the audience was transported to another world, enthralled by the psychological effects of the music and the skill of the musicians, who performed each note with precision and passion. (SSC CHSL 09/08/2023 4th Shift)
options: swept away by the emotive power
taken in by the effect on emotions
questions.explanation: संगीत की भावनात्मक शक्ति के लिए 'swept away by the emotive power' सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q375. I need to put out my clothes before I leave for work this morning otherwise, I will be restless when I return. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: कपड़ों को सही जगह रखने के लिए 'put away' का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q376. As the storm raged outside, the children huddled together under blankets, listening to the sound of the rain hitting the windows hard and hoping that the power wouldn't go out. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: भारी बारिश की आवाज़ के लिए 'pounding against' (टकराना) सही है.

questions.question: Q377. Pooja could feel the anger building off inside her. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: भावनाओं के बढ़ने के लिए 'building up' phrasal verb का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q378. The health-care system is in transition at those moment. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'At the moment' (इस समय) सही idiom है.

questions.question: Q379. The fields are full of crops existing in large quantities. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Existing in large quantities' का अर्थ है 'abundant' (प्रचुर मात्रा में).

questions.question: Q380. She will accept his love proposal if he will express impressively. (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Conditional sentence (Type 1): 'If' clause में Simple Present Tense (expresses) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q381. Could you please tell me which movie you would like to watch tonight? (SSC CHSL 10/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Would like to' के स्थान पर 'are wishing to' (इच्छा रखना) एक सही विकल्प हो सकता है (हालांकि 'would like to' भी सही है, विकल्प अनुसार).

questions.question: Q382. In according to his advice I took this medicine. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: सही phrase 'In accordance with' (के अनुसार) है.

questions.question: Q383. I am trying to study, if it is impossible with all this noise. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: विरोधाभास (trying to study vs impossible) के लिए 'but' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q384. Can you please tell me where is the city park. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Indirect question में subject verb से पहले आता है ('where the city park is').

questions.question: Q385. This hill is a nice place to meditate because one can enjoy solitude. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 3rd Shift)
options: is a nice place to be meditation
is an excellent place to meditates
is a nasty place to meditate
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है.

questions.question: Q386. No less than eight pedestrians were killed in the accident. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Countable noun (pedestrians) के लिए 'less' के स्थान पर 'fewer' का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q387. How do you think the internet has influenced how we utilise news and media ? (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 4th Shift)
options: has managed the patterns we ingest
has revoked the way we interact
has impacted the way we consume
questions.explanation: मीडिया का उपयोग करने के लिए 'consume' और प्रभाव के लिए 'impacted' सही शब्द हैं.

questions.question: Q388. Meenakshi called out for the neighbourhood to get support for her campaign. (SSC CHSL 11/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: समर्थन के लिए कई लोगों से संपर्क करने के लिए 'called around' सही phrasal verb है.

questions.question: Q389. Despite facing numerous obstacles and setbacks, the determined entrepreneur refused to give up on her dream of creating a successful startup that would transform the sector. (SSC CHSL 14/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Transform the sector' का अर्थ 'revolutionise the industry' (उद्योग में क्रांति लाना) के समान है.

questions.question: Q390. Amal brightened of when they said he could go with them. (SSC CHSL 14/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Brighten up' का अर्थ है खुश हो जाना.

questions.question: Q391. The company is planning to cut back few employees. (SSC CHSL 14/08/2023 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: कर्मचारियों को निकालने के लिए 'lay off' का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q392. From a recent research, evident is it that a lot more women have been opting for professional courses. (SSC CHSL 17/08/2023 2nd Shift)
options: it is evident that more a lot women
it is evidently that a lot more women
it is evident that a lot more women
it is evidence that a lot more women
questions.explanation: सही वाक्य विन्यास 'It is evident that' (यह स्पष्ट है कि) है.

questions.question: Q393. She is the least reliablest person of all. (SSC CHSL 17/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Least' अपने आप में superlative है, इसके साथ 'reliablest' का प्रयोग गलत है. 'Least reliable' सही है.

questions.question: Q394. The young artist spent countless hours perfecting her craft, trying with various methods and mediums, and honing her creative vision... (SSC CHSL 17/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: कला में नए तरीकों को आजमाने के लिए 'experimenting with' सही phrase है.

questions.question: Q395. The students were restored to complete the assignment by Friday. (SSC CHSL 17/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: छात्रों से assignment पूरा करने की 'expected' (उम्मीद) की जाती है, 'restored' नहीं.

questions.question: Q396. The GDP of the country has growth rapidly since independence. (SSC CHSL 17/08/2023 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Tense में 'has' के बाद verb की 3rd form ('grown') आएगी.

questions.question: Q397. She had an ability to persuade others. (SSC CGL 14/07/2023 1st shift)
questions.explanation: 'Persuade' (मनाना) का करीबी विकल्प यहाँ 'impress' (प्रभावित करना) हो सकता है (संदर्भ अनुसार).

questions.question: Q398. We must remember that what we teach our children is what we inculcate in them. (SSC CGL 14/07/2023 1st shift)
questions.explanation: 'Inculcate' (मन में बैठाना) का पर्यायवाची 'instil' है.

questions.question: Q399. The fact that God created man in his personal view by giving him an intellectual spirit elevates him above the beasts of the field. (SSC CGL 14/07/2023 2nd shift)
questions.explanation: "In his own image" (अपने स्वरूप में) एक बाइबिल का वाक्यांश है जो यहाँ सही है.

questions.question: Q400. The frog adopts itself to live both in water and on land. (SSC CGL 14/07/2023 3rd shift)
questions.explanation: 'Adapts' का अर्थ है अनुकूल बनाना, जबकि 'adopts' का अर्थ है गोद लेना. मेंढक अनुकूलन करता है.
